description_long: This is a stylized horse with a deep reddish-brown body and striking black and orange accents on its face, ears, and lower legs. The horse's head is elongated, with prominent, upright ears and a pronounced, angular snout. Its eyes are set forward and highlighted by the dark mask-like marking that covers the upper face and ears. The legs are slender and end in bright orange hooves, contrasting sharply with the darker body. The mane is short and appears to be integrated into the black facial marking, while the tail is similarly dark and tapers to a point. The overall form is robust and muscular, with subtle surface details suggesting musculature beneath the smooth exterior.
description: A stylized, muscular horse with a reddish-brown body, black facial markings, and orange hooves, featuring a short mane and tail.
description_view_0: Front view shows the horse's broad chest, upright ears, and prominent black and orange facial markings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the horse's muscular body, short mane, and the gradient from dark body to orange hooves.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the horse's rounded hindquarters, dark tail, and the symmetry of the legs and body.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same color transitions and body contours.
attribute_pose: Standing square with head held forward and ears alert.
attribute_mane_style: Short and integrated into the black facial marking.
attribute_leg_position: All four legs are firmly planted on the ground in a natural standing stance.
